sources.title: KAIST bulletin crawl manifest (Wave 1.5 hardened)
sources.notes: Collected with agent-browser from the verified initPageWork.do SSO entry. Records the refreshed 2019-2025 four-department crawl scope, 2019 re-check outcomes, duplicate-iframe resolutions, and remaining source-boundary caveats.

sources.title: KAIST bulletin department document inventory (Wave 1.5 matrix)
sources.notes: Machine-readable 2019-2025 slot matrix for AE/ME/CS/EE. Every year x department x document-type slot is labeled captured or missing with reconciliation notes for the former manual-recheck cases.

sources.title: KAIST StreamDocs metadata summaries (Wave 1.5 refreshed)
sources.notes: Official StreamDocs metadata summaries fetched from the documented /documents/<streamdocsId>/document endpoint for the current bulletin inventory after the Wave 1.5 re-checks.

sources.title: KAIST ERP course catalog query inventory (Wave 1.5 clarified)
sources.notes: Spring 2025 prefix-based inventory plus fall-semester recheck attempts. Preserves broad query provenance, row-evidence limits, and the fall-semester instability without promoting ERP labels to graduation truth.

sources.title: KAIST ERP exact course-code snapshots (2025 spring)
sources.notes: Row-level ERP snapshots for the prototype in-scope course list, captured with exact course-code filters. Preserves full visible rows, zero-result attempts, and year-selector quirks for auditability.

sources.title: KAIST ERP row-evidence map (Wave 1.5 clarified)
sources.notes: Links each four-department spring prefix snapshot to the exact course-code row artifact and explicitly grades the unresolved fall 2025 semester-instability as supporting-only evidence.

sources.title: Wave 1.5 source-truth reconciliation artifact
sources.notes: Machine-readable reconciliation artifact for Wave 1.5. Distinguishes resolved duplicate captures, confirmed-missing 2019 slots, newly captured 2019 CS/EE tabs, and ERP evidence that remains supporting-only.

sources.title: Wave 2 reviewed AE interpretation database
sources.notes: Authoritative reviewed AE rule interpretation for the 2019-2025 undergraduate scope, with provenance-linked bulletin excerpts and honest support boundaries.

sources.title: Wave 2 reviewed ME interpretation database
sources.notes: Authoritative reviewed ME rule interpretation for the 2019-2025 undergraduate scope, with provenance-linked bulletin excerpts and honest support boundaries.

sources.title: Wave 2 reviewed CS interpretation database
sources.notes: Authoritative reviewed CS rule interpretation for the 2019-2025 undergraduate scope, with provenance-linked bulletin excerpts and honest support boundaries.

sources.title: Wave 2 reviewed EE interpretation database
sources.notes: Authoritative reviewed EE rule interpretation for the 2019-2025 undergraduate scope, with provenance-linked bulletin excerpts and honest support boundaries.

sources.title: Wave 2 reviewed interpretation notes
sources.notes: Human-readable department notes, year-boundary summaries, and acceptance examples for the Wave 2 reviewed interpretation database.

sources.title: Phase 0-1 domain interpretation skeleton
sources.notes: Support boundary matrix, ubiquitous language, known unknowns, and the next safe implementation step after corpus acquisition.

sources.title: Legacy KAIST ERP course offering snapshot
sources.notes: Pre-phase curated summary used by the prototype dataset. Useful as exploratory context only; not sufficient support backing on its own.

sources.title: Legacy AE graduation requirement notes
sources.notes: Pre-phase condensed notes. Kept for auditability of the prototype dataset, but no longer treated as sufficient evidence for supported claims.

sources.title: Legacy ME graduation requirement notes
sources.notes: Pre-phase curated summary for the prototype planner. Not official-source-backed enough for supported claims.

sources.title: Legacy CS graduation requirement notes
sources.notes: Pre-phase curated summary for the prototype planner. Not official-source-backed enough for supported claims.

sources.title: Legacy EE graduation requirement notes
sources.notes: Pre-phase curated summary for the prototype planner. Not official-source-backed enough for supported claims.

sources.title: Department planner curated overrides
sources.notes: Legacy prototype overrides retained for auditability. They may interpret earlier summaries but do not replace official-source acquisition.
